overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a western-themed video game showing a cowboy character walking through a rural settlement at night. The character moves from a wooden barn area through dirt roads and grassy terrain, passing various camp structures and eventually encountering a horse rider near an illuminated house.

scene_state.functional_zone: dirt road near large wooden barn

agents.ego_description: walking steadily away from the wooden barn along the dirt path

entered.detail: two-story wooden barn with open ground floor and external staircase
old wooden wagon with white canvas cover parked on the dirt
simple wooden post fence lining the path
muddy dirt path with wagon tracks

segments.scene_description: The segment begins near a large wooden barn at night, with the character walking away from it along a dirt road. A covered wagon sits parked to the left while telegraph poles line the path ahead. The area is quiet and empty, illuminated by moonlight and warm lantern glow from the barn.

events.description: red canvas tent becomes visible in the settlement center ahead

agents.ego_description: walking through the settlement center passing wooden structures and camp areas

entered.detail: large red canvas tent with peaked roof
small white wooden house with illuminated windows on a grassy rise
burning campfire with orange glow near the tents

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the settlement, the large barn falls behind as a red canvas tent comes into view on the right. A white house with lit windows appears in the distance atop a grassy rise, while campfires burn between the scattered structures. The ground remains muddy dirt with sparse vegetation.

events.description: ground surface transitions from dirt to grassy terrain

agents.ego_description: walking up the grassy incline toward the illuminated white house

entered.detail: tall green grass covering the ground on both sides of the path

segments.scene_description: The terrain shifts from muddy dirt to grassy ground as the character approaches the white house on the right. The red tent and campfire recede into the background while the house becomes more prominent, its windows glowing warmly against the dark night. Wooden fences line the left side of the path.

events.description: horse with rider approaches from ahead and passes by on the left

agents.ego_description: continuing along the grassy path as a horse rider passes by

notable_agents.action: rider on horseback approaching from the distance and passing by on the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: In the final stretch, a horse and rider emerge from the darkness ahead, passing by on the left as the character continues forward. The white house recedes into the distance on the right, while the grassy terrain extends ahead under the starry night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a quiet rural settlement at night, transitioning from a rustic barn area toward an open grassy expanse. It begins by moving away from a large wooden barn and a parked covered wagon along a dirt road lined with telegraph poles under the glow of moonlight. As the camera pushes deeper into the settlement, the barn recedes to make way for a red canvas tent and flickering campfires, while a white house with lit windows emerges on a distant rise. The terrain then shifts from muddy dirt to lush grass as the camera approaches the glowing house and passes wooden fences lining the path. Finally, the scene opens up under a starry sky as a horse and rider emerge from the darkness to pass by on the left, while the house fades into the background.
